RAFAL OFIERSKI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO CHIEF OF POLICE.

Judge Miller disclosed at the hearing that she knows and is social friends with Deputy City Attorney Elizabeth Salveson. Judge Miller practiced law in the same firm as Ms Salveson from December 1981 - March 1987, and from 1992 through 1995. This will not affect Judge Miller's ability to be fair and impartial in this case, and she does not believe that a person aware of these facts would reasonably have a doubt that she would be able to be impartial. RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN FRANCISCO CHIEF OF POLICE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
